query: List all assets under the North Region transmission system
expected_behavior: Loads maximo-asset-hierarchy with maximo-overview as parent
Resolves 'North Region transmission system' through the workspace glossary to a LOCATION value or SYSTEM identifier
Uses LOCANCESTOR closure table with SYSTEMID = 'PRIMARY' (or appropriate system) — does NOT use naive PARENT self-join (which would return only one level)
Joins to ASSET via location to get the asset list
Filters by SITEID (asset-hierarchy gotcha #3 — SITEID belongs in every join)
If LOCANCESTOR is not materialized, falls back to recursive CTE on LOCHIERARCHY (probes existence first)
